title: Mini Decorative Polystyrene Glitter Egg Picks (3.5 x 2.5 x 2.5 cm) Pack of 6 - Assorted Colors Design, Perfect for Arts & Crafts Applications
features: VIBRANT EASTER ACCENTS: Our pack of 6 decorative glitter egg picks (3.5 x 2.5 x 2.5 cm) in assorted cheerful colors (yellow, pink, lilac, blue, orange, green) instantly brightens any seasonal craft or display.
QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from durable polystyrene, these egg picks are designed to maintain their shape and sparkle throughout your festive celebrations.

EASY TO INCORPORATE INTO ANY DECOR: These mini egg picks are extremely versatile and can be added to any Easter or spring-themed decor. Simply place them in an arrangement, attach them to a garland, or use them as part of a centerpiece.

VERSATILE USE: Perfect for Easter bonnets, holiday hampers, baked treat adornments, or as eye-catching additions to any Easter-themed centerpiece. These mini egg picks are a fun and versatile addition to your Easter decorations.
KID-FRIENDLY FUN: These mini egg picks are the perfect addition to any child's Easter crafts. They can also be used for educational activities such as color recognition and counting.
description: Add a wonderful touch of art to any crafty creation, with this Min egg. Add them to an easter hamper or simply add them to an easter display.
